Title: Save push message as draft
Steps:
1. Navigate to Push Messages
2. Create new message
3. Fill in content
4. Save as Draft
Expected Result: Push message saved as draft; confirmation popup for unsaved changes works

Title: Draft validation - empty fields
Steps:
1. Leave all fields empty
2. Click Save
Expected Result: Validation error shown; save prevented for empty fields

Title: Save draft with schedule date
Steps:
1. Fill in content
2. Set schedule date
3. Save as Draft

Title: Edit draft message
Steps:
1. Open draft message
2. Edit content
3. Save

Title: Delete draft message
Steps:
1. Select draft message
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm

Title: Search messages by status
Steps:
1. Use status filter/search
2. Verify filtered results

Title: Publish message with schedule date
Steps:
1. Open draft message
2. Set schedule date
3. Click Publish
Expected Result: Message scheduled for publication at specified date

Title: Check created date in store
Steps:
1. Navigate to store context
2. Verify created date of published message
Expected Result: Created date matches expected publish schedule

Title: Track new recipients - enabled
Steps:
1. Create message with Track New Recipients ON
2. Verify new recipients receive message
Expected Result: New recipients automatically receive the message

Title: Track new recipients - disabled
Steps:
1. Set Track New Recipients OFF
2. Add new users
3. Verify they do not receive message
Expected Result: New recipients do NOT receive message when tracking disabled

Title: API - retrieve unread messages
Preconditions: Published push messages exist; user authenticated
Steps:
1. Call API to get unread push messages
2. Verify response contains unread messages
Expected Result: Unread messages returned with correct data

Title: API - mark single message as read
Steps:
1. Call mark as read API for single message
2. Verify message status

Title: API - mark single message as unread
Steps:
1. Call mark as unread API for single message
2. Verify message status

Title: API - mark all messages as read
Steps: 1. Call mark all as read API

Title: API - mark all messages as unread
Steps: 1. Call mark all as unread API

Title: API - clear all push messages
Steps: 1. Call clear all push messages API
Expected Result: All push messages cleared for user
